#include<bits/stdc++.h>
using namespace std;int i,j,t;bool m[4][4];int main(){string s;cin>>s;for(i=0;i<s.length();i++){t=s[i]-'0'-1;m[t/3+1][t%3+1]=i%2==0?0:1;}for(i=1;i<=3;i++){if(m[i][1]==m[i][2]&&m[i][2]==m[i][3]){if(m[i][1])cout<<"uim wins.
";else cout<<"xiaoa wins.
";return 0;}if(m[1][i]==m[2][i]&&m[2][i]==m[3][i]){if(m[1][i])cout<<"uim wins.
";else cout<<"xiaoa wins.
";return 0;}}if(m[1][1]==m[2][2]&&m[2][2]==m[3][3]){if(m[1][1])cout<<"uim wins.
";else cout<<"xiaoa wins.
";return 0;}if(m[1][3]==m[2][2]&&m[2][2]==m[3][1]){if(m[1][3])cout<<"uim wins.
";else cout<<"xiaoa wins.
";return 0;}cout<<"drew.
";return 0;}
